description.value: When your enemies have you cornered, you become ever more vicious. If the next action you use is to Cast a Spell that deals damage to a single target, and if that spell doesn't have a duration, you gain a circumstance bonus to its damage equal to twice the sum of your @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Frightened] and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Wounded] conditions (to a maximum of +12) if you have one or both conditions.
